claim: Vercel AI SDK's unified interface allows swapping LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Perplexity, etc.) by changing one line of code; same function signature across 30+ supported models/providers
actionable: Use Vercel AI SDK to abstract model selection; build prompts and logic once, then swap providers via environment variables or function parameters for cost/latency optimization.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Aayush Kapoor: Vercel AI SDK: From Fundamentals to Deep Research

claim: generateText() function runs for one LLM step by default; step_count_is helper + stop_when parameter allow multi-turn loops where tool results are fed back to the model for iterative refinement
actionable: Set step_count_is(2) or higher to let the model loop: call a tool, get the result, then pass it back to the model for synthesis.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Aayush Kapoor: Vercel AI SDK: From Fundamentals to Deep Research

claim: LLMs infer missing tool parameters from prompts and tool schemas without explicit input; example: getWeather tool infers SF/NYC latitude-longitude from 'get weather in SF and New York City' prompt
actionable: Define tool schemas completely; let the LLM infer reasonable parameter values from context rather than requiring users to specify lat/long or API keys explicitly.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Aayush Kapoor: Vercel AI SDK: From Fundamentals to Deep Research

claim: generateObject() function + Zod schema validation provides type-safe outputs and structured JSON responses; more reliable than parsing text-based LLM responses for data extraction
actionable: For tasks requiring structured outputs (lists, JSON objects), use generateObject() with Zod schema instead of prompting for text and parsing manually.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Aayush Kapoor: Vercel AI SDK: From Fundamentals to Deep Research

claim: Deep research agent pattern: generate search queries (breadth) → search web → evaluate relevance → generate learnings → recursively generate follow-up queries (depth) → synthesize into markdown report
actionable: Build deep research agents by iterating: generate N sub-queries, search each, grade relevance, extract learnings, then recurse on follow-ups with depth decremented; synthesize final report at base case.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Aayush Kapoor: Vercel AI SDK: From Fundamentals to Deep Research

claim: Tool evaluation function with enum outputs (relevant/irrelevant) + feedback loop allows agents to self-correct: if irrelevant, agent re-calls search tool; relevant results feed into learnings generation
actionable: Implement enum-based tool evaluation; if output is invalid, increase step_count to re-run the problematic tool rather than failing silently.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Aayush Kapoor: Vercel AI SDK: From Fundamentals to Deep Research

claim: Exa AI is recommended web search API for deep research agents; returns title, URL, and crawled content in structured format suited for LLM processing
actionable: For agentic research tasks, use Exa AI's search_and_contents() method to get web results with parsed content ready for LLM analysis.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Aayush Kapoor: Vercel AI SDK: From Fundamentals to Deep Research

claim: When designing recursive agents, always include a base case (depth == 0) to prevent infinite loops; decrement depth counter on each recursive call
actionable: In any recursive agent pattern, check depth >= 0 at the top; decrement by 1 on each recursive call; return accumulated results at base case.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Aayush Kapoor: Vercel AI SDK: From Fundamentals to Deep Research
